message: I've been thinking about how heat waves can really sneak up on us—and how a little prep makes such a difference when the temperature climbs. I found this solid resource that breaks down some practical stuff about staying safe and comfortable when it gets hot, without any of the doom-and-gloom framing. It's one of those things that's actually kind of nice to know before you need it. What's your go-to move when things heat up—do you have a favorite way to keep your place cool, or is it just cranking the AC and hoping for the best?
